description: An agent must analyze a client's financial statements (CSV) to identify trends in profitability and liquidity.

nodes.task_description: Load the provided CSV of financial data and calculate key financial ratios (e.g., Gross Profit Margin, Current Ratio) for the last 5 years.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the financial ratios for each year.

nodes.task_description: Identify the year-over-year trend for each calculated ratio.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies trends, such as 'Gross Profit Margin has been decreasing since 2022'.

nodes.task_description: Generate a summary report highlighting the key findings, such as declining profitability and improving liquidity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a concise text summary of the financial health trends.
